title: Eltroplectris roseoalba

It belongs to the genus Eltroplectris, which is a group of orchids native to tropical regions. The specific classification of Eltroplectris roseoalba is further categorized under the subfamily Orchidoideae. Eltroplectris roseoalba is a rare and lesser-known species within the orchid family. intro: Eltroplectris roseoalba is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including inflammation, fever, and respiratory issues, due to its potential anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antipyretic properties. The bioactive constituents of Eltroplectris roseoalba include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic compounds, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Eltroplectris roseoalba is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are used to treat various health conditions, particularly in traditional medicine practices in West Africa.
